channel.title: Vercel This Serverless Function has crashed
channel.description:
Hi there,
I have deployed a Frontity website on Vercel but almost every time I visit the website for the first time I get an error screen with This Serverless Function has crashed. Versel is working correctly and has no errors.
Does anyone know where I can look to figure out the Serverless Funtion that is causing issues?
Many thanks

item.title: Vercel This Serverless Function has crashed
item.dc:creator: jeff
item.description:
Great, found it! Thank you

Read full topic
item.source: Vercel This Serverless Function has crashed

item.title: Vercel This Serverless Function has crashed
item.dc:creator: ni.bonev
item.description:
Vercel has some logs that get updated as visit the website.
Go to function logs, and then make a request to the site. You should see the request and what happened with it in the logs.

Read full topic
item.source: Vercel This Serverless Function has crashed

Hi there,

I have deployed a Frontity website on Vercel but almost every time I visit the website for the first time I get an error screen with This Serverless Function has crashed. Versel is working correctly and has no errors.

Does anyone know where I can look to figure out the Serverless Funtion that is causing issues?

Many thanks
